record_type: # WEEKLY OPERATIONS — fill every Monday for the prior week. One file covers trips
# The `record_type` column tells the system what the row represents.
#   SHIFT        — one row per driver-day. Fills: date
#   TRIP         — one row per completed ride. Fills: date
#   FUEL         — one row per refill or charging session. Fills: date
#   MAINTENANCE  — one row per workshop visit. Fills: date
# Valid platforms: Bolt | Uber | Bolt+Uber | Norgestaxi | Direct
# Valid maintenance types: OIL_CHANGE | TYRES | BRAKES | INSPECTION | REPAIR | ACCIDENT | OTHER
# Dates: YYYY-MM-DD. Times: HH:MM (24h). Leave any column blank if it doesn't apply to that row type.
